description:
The render_* helpers in ir_codegen.rs (used by fz_print_value and tests) belong with FzValue. Move into fz_value.rs (as a `pub mod debug`) or a sibling module.

## Acceptance

- cargo test green.
- ir_codegen.rs has no `render_*` fns.
title: Extract value rendering (render_fz_value etc.) into fz_value debug module
